claim: Prompt engineering is emerging as a fundamental unit of programming alongside traditional coding; top performers will spend equivalent time on prompts as they do on code
actionable: Add prompt engineering to your daily practice with equal weight to code writing; create prompt libraries, test prompt variations, and document effective prompts like you would code
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Open-source LLMs will achieve GPT-3.5 Turbo performance levels in 2024, reducing dependency on proprietary APIs for many use cases and enabling on-device deployment
actionable: Evaluate open-source models monthly against 3.5 Turbo baselines for your specific use cases; build inference infrastructure for on-device models to prepare for cost advantages
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Beginners should use LLMs as learning tools, not shortcuts; those relying on LLMs without understanding will plateau and become unemployable as baseline capabilities increase
actionable: In first year of programming, only use LLMs for things you already understand or can verify; use outputs to learn, not replace learning; gradually shift to using LLMs for known-unknown tasks
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Top-performing engineers will move up the stack (more business/product, less implementation) by using AI tools; those who don't adopt AI assistance will be displaced by those who do
actionable: If senior engineer, adopt AI tools to automate implementation details; allocate freed time to strategy, architecture, and business problems; measure impact on team velocity and your time allocation shift
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Front-end engineering roles will be hit hardest by AI automation because after building a few components, most custom UIs can be prompted into existence with good component libraries
actionable: If front-end engineer, develop expertise in component libraries, design systems, and accessibility (hard for AI to get right); move toward architecture/systems thinking to stay valuable
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: No-code and low-code platforms integrated with LLMs will become the standard for rapid prototyping and may replace traditional programming for non-complex applications
actionable: Evaluate low-code platforms with LLM support for CRUD/workflow-heavy projects; reserve custom code for complex business logic and performance-critical paths
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Great predictions have accountability; making public predictions with clear success criteria forces better decision-making and focus than uncommitted strategic thinking
actionable: Write down quarterly predictions for your work/career with success metrics; review them monthly; adjust strategy based on predictions that were wrong
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Chat interfaces are becoming ubiquitous but will be replaced by novel AI UIs mid-2024; someone will create a new interaction model that makes current chat UI seem lazy
actionable: Don't assume chat UI is optimal for your use case; experiment with structured prompting, form-based AI, and modal-based flows; test retention impact of UI changes
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: Local LLMs (Ollama, llamafile) will reach parity with API-based models for many tasks; start experimenting now to understand tradeoffs before decision point
actionable: Set up local LLM infrastructure now (Ollama or llamafile); benchmark your specific tasks monthly against API models; identify tasks where local models are sufficient and cap inference costs
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers

claim: TypeScript and Python will remain dominant multi-purpose languages; mastery ensures employability across all AI-enhanced software roles
actionable: If learning programming, prioritize Python and TypeScript over emerging languages; focus on depth in these two rather than breadth in many languages
source_title: 2024 Predictions for Advanced AI & LLM Engineers
